agent-development.reason: Removed duplicate Quick Reference and Best Practices sections, removed references to non-existent scripts (validate-agent.sh, test-agent-trigger.sh). Reduced from 415 to 330 lines. Unique value for Claude Code agent authoring — no plugin covers this.

file-organizer.reason: 433 lines of generic file-management advice Claude already handles natively. Context token cost (~1.5K tokens) with no behavioral change. Removed from plugin.json, directory pending user deletion.

pr-ready.reason: Unique workflow chaining test execution, reviewer-facing verification guide, self-verification, and PR creation. 121 lines, concise. Integrates with tsg. No plugin equivalent.

release.reason: Project-specific release automation for weed-harness: version bump across plugin.json + marketplace.json, tag, push, GitHub Release, marketplace sync, cache update. 157 lines, bespoke.

scout.reason: 95 lines, parallel Explore agent dispatch pattern. Referenced in MEMORY.md and CLAUDE.md. No plugin provides equivalent coordinated parallel-scout.

skill-recommend.reason: Updated matching heuristics table to reference actually-installed skills with correct plugin prefixes. Removed references to non-existent standalone skills (debugger, deployment-patterns, etc.). 102 lines.

test-validation.reason: Unique FAIL-to-PASS validation pattern with judgment matrix (4 outcomes) and automatic test repair. Clean TSG integration. 231 lines.

tsg.reason: Core knowledge management skill with structured issue recording, search, resolve workflow, and automatic README indexing. Cross-referenced by pr-ready and test-validation. 378 lines justified by 6 subcommands.

autocode.reason: Added ML-specific redirect note at top pointing to /auto_research. 376 lines. Unique autonomous experiment loop — no plugin equivalent.

auto_research.reason: Replaced ~120 lines of duplicated experiment loop (copied from autocode) with reference to autocode Steps 3D-3H plus ML-specific additions. Reduced from 578 to 456 lines. Unique value: deep-interview init, ML domain knowledge, experiment taxonomy, VRAM tracking.

commit.reason: 66 lines, focused commit workflow with atomic splitting, test coverage check, sensitive file check, HEREDOC format. Enforces CLAUDE.md no-Co-Authored-By rule. Meaningfully changes default behavior.

devlog.reason: Structured development journal with trial-and-error logging, user_validation tracking, and reject workflow. TSG integration. Autocode metric_was_improved field. 290 lines.
